basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University is recruiting 1 Project Assistant under CMRG Project.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Experience in research, publications, and AI/Supply Chain related work | age limit: As per University norms
qualification.education_qualification: MBA in Marketing/General / B.E. or other relevant disciplines with Coding Knowledge

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Interview for shortlisted candidates Date of interview will be intimated via email No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview
how_to_apply: Interested candidates should send a brief biodata along with relevant copies of experience certificates and research publications (if any) to the Principal Investigator.
By Post to: Dr. G. Barani Associate Professor Bharathiar School of Management and Entrepreneur Development Bharathiar University, Coimbatore - 641046, Tamil Nadu
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and project-based. This is not a regular university appointment. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. The decision of the selection committee will be final.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Bharathiar University, Coimbatore invites applications for the post of Project Assistant in the CMRG-funded research project under the supervision of Dr. G. Barani, Associate Professor, Bharathiar School of Management and Entrepreneur Development. Download Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Bharathiar University is recruiting 1 Project Assistant under CMRG Project.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Name of the Post: Project Assistant No. of Vacancy: 01

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: MBA in Marketing/General / B.E. or other relevant disciplines with Coding Knowledge
Experience in research, publications, and AI/Supply Chain related work

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of applications Interview for shortlisted candidates Date of interview will be intimated via email No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should send a brief biodata along with relevant copies of experience certificates and research publications (if any) to the Principal Investigator. By Post to: Dr. G. Barani Associate Professor Bharathiar School of Management and Entrepreneur Development Bharathiar University, Coimbatore - 641046, Tamil Nadu By Email to: [email protected] Last Date: 22 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and project-based. This is not a regular university appointment. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. The decision of the selection committee will be final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Project Assistant at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: MBA in Marketing/General / B.E. or relevant disciplines with Coding Knowledge.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend for Project Assistant under CMRG Project?
faq.answer: Monthly stipend is Rs. 25,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in Bharathiar University CMRG Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The project duration is 3 years.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Send biodata with supporting documents by post or email to [email protected] on or before 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely temporary project position under CMRG 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for this Bharathiar University vacancy?
faq.answer: An Integrated Model Balancing Supply Chain of Staple Perishable Goods through AI based solution.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be an interview for Bharathiar University Project Assistant?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Date will be informed via email.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for this CMRG project?
faq.answer: Dr. G. Barani, Associate Professor, Bharathiar School of Management and Entrepreneur Development, Bharathiar University.
